name: Hidden Lakes
address: 202 Golf Club Dr, New Smyrna Beach, FL 32168
about: Hidden Lakes Golf Club offers a public golf course and a state-of-the-art golf simulator facility in New Smyrna Beach, Florida. The venue provides an indoor golf experience allowing players of all skill levels to play on world-famous courses regardless of weather conditions, complete with real-time data tracking and challenges. Alongside the simulator, the club features a full 19th Hole restaurant and bar, private event options, and a complete golf operation including lessons, tournaments, and memberships for both annual and seasonal play.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulator technology for indoor play
Private events with simulator and pub food combination
Convenient online booking system for simulator time
Variety of on-course amenities including the 19th Hole restaurant
Welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant and bar menu available at the 19th Hole, featuring comfort food, fresh salads, and hearty sides.
Full bar with craft beers, classic cocktails, and wine available at the 19th Hole.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The golf simulator experience allows golfers to play with their own clubs or utilize equipment provided at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue operates with its own restaurant and bar, the 19th Hole, where food and beverages must be purchased.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The typical duration for an 18-hole simulator session is approximately 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly with specific junior golf programs and events available throughout the year.
